# CSRD Readiness & TCFD Scenario Analysis

This engagement prepares Globex for its first CSRD-compliant sustainability statement, spanning a double-materiality assessment with internal and external stakeholder interviews, GRI-aligned data governance covering twelve legal entities, and a TCFD-framework climate scenario analysis. Biweekly steering calls with Sofia and Marcus track workstream progress against the December reporting deadline and surface entity-level data quality issues early. The TCFD deliverable will be integrated directly into the annual report's risk section.
